# `WaitNoRaster`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, OK64, GAMEBOY, SPECTRUM, MSX,  TIKI100  
**Parameters:** `b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Waits [parameter 1] amount of raster lines. Example:
<code>
waitforraster(100);
SCREEN_BG_COL:=RED;
SCREEN_FG_COL:=RED;
waitnoraster(80); 
SCREEN_BG_COL:=BLACK;
SCREEN_FG_COL:=BLACK;

</code> 


</div>
